channel.title: Benchmark PS Blog
channel.description: Practical insights on physiotherapy outcomes, MSK measurement, and evidence-based practice.

item.title: Why Physiotherapy Clinics That Measure Outcomes Retain More Patients (and Charge More)
item.description: Data shows physio clinics using objective outcome measures retain 40% more patients and justify premium pricing through measurable treatment effectiveness.

item.title: Single-Leg Calf Raise: What the Test Tells You About Achilles and Calf Capacity
item.description: Single-leg calf raise testing provides objective data on Achilles tendon and calf capacity. Learn clinical parameters, normative values, and testing protocols.

item.title: How to Implement Objective Physiotherapy Assessment Without Expensive Equipment
item.description: Learn to implement objective physiotherapy assessment using standardised protocols and software-enabled tools without expensive equipment purchases.

item.title: MSK Outcome Benchmarks: What Good Conservative Care Actually Looks Like
item.description: Evidence-based MSK outcome benchmarks reveal what effective conservative physiotherapy looks like. Data from systematic reviews shows measurable success.

item.title: Evidence-Based Progression in Physiotherapy: A Framework for Time-Pressured Clinicians
item.description: Evidence-based progression frameworks for physiotherapy practice. Practical protocols for load progression, outcome measurement, and clinical decisions under pressure.

item.title: Why 43% of Physiotherapy Care Is Non-Recommended — and What Clinics Can Do About It
item.description: Research shows 43% of physiotherapy interventions lack evidence support. Learn how objective measurement and standardised protocols reduce clinical variation.

item.title: Knee Extension Strength After ACL Reconstruction: Quadriceps Force and Return-to-Sport Criteria
item.description: Evidence-based quadriceps strength testing and return-to-sport criteria after ACL reconstruction. Objective measurement protocols for safer athletic clearance.

item.title: ACL Return-to-Sport Testing: Which Criteria Actually Predict Re-Injury Risk
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of ACL return-to-sport testing criteria that actually predict re-injury risk. Which tests matter most for safe athletic return decisions?

item.title: The State of Technology in Physiotherapy: What Works, What Doesn't, and What's Coming
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of physiotherapy technology: what works in clinical practice, common implementation failures, and emerging tools that improve outcomes.

item.title: Hip Strength Testing in Athletes: The Adductor-Abductor Balance That Predicts Groin Injury
item.description: Hip adductor-abductor strength imbalances predict groin injuries in athletes. Learn evidence-based testing protocols for injury prevention and return-to-play decisions.

item.title: Knee Osteoarthritis and Conservative Care: Setting Realistic Expectations With Objective Data
item.description: Learn how objective measurement transforms knee osteoarthritis care. Evidence-based expectations, realistic goals, and data-driven decision making for physios.

item.title: Shoulder Rotation Strength in Overhead Athletes: The ER/IR Ratio That Changes Management
item.description: Evidence-based shoulder rotation strength testing for overhead athletes. Learn the ER/IR ratio thresholds that predict injury risk and guide treatment decisions.

item.title: Trunk Endurance Testing in Low Back Rehabilitation: What Plank, Side Plank, and Sorenson Tell You
item.description: Master trunk endurance testing protocols for low back rehabilitation. Learn how plank, side plank, and Sorenson tests guide clinical decisions and treatment.

item.title: The Economic Case for Better MSK Conservative Care
item.description: Evidence shows conservative MSK care outperforms surgery on cost-effectiveness. Learn how measurement-driven physiotherapy delivers better outcomes for less.

item.title: The Business Case for Outcome Measurement in Physiotherapy Clinics
item.description: Build a defensible business case for outcome measurement in physiotherapy clinics. Evidence-based strategies to improve clinical consistency and practice sustainability.
